title: Exploring Magnets — Fill in the Blanks
instructions_for_student: Select the correct word from each dropdown to complete the four sentences. Correct answers turn green. If you pick a wrong answer, a hint will appear to guide you. You need to fill all blanks correctly to see your final score!

quizData.title: Exploring Magnets
quizData.subtitle: Select the correct word from each dropdown to complete the sentences.

blanks.hint: Think about Activity 4.5 — when N and S poles face each other, what happens?
In Activity 4.5, N–N or S–S poles pushed each other away.

template: The materials that are attracted towards a magnet are called

blanks.hint: Recall Activity 4.1 — iron, nickel, and cobalt stuck to the magnet.

template: The needle of a magnetic compass rests along the

blanks.hint: Activity 4.3 showed a freely suspended magnet always aligns with Earth's field.
Even if you break a magnet into pieces, both a North AND a South pole always exist together.

schema.description: Configuration schema for MagnetQuiz — a fill-in-the-blank interactive quiz tool for Grade 6 Science (Exploring Magnets chapter). Themed with the Poppins font and the purple/orange design palette from the Singularity design system.

themeColor.description: Primary brand color (hex). Default: #533086 (purple from design PDF).

additionalProps.description: Dynamic content and feature toggles for the quiz.

showHints.description: Show a contextual hint referencing the relevant chapter activity when a wrong answer is selected.

celebrateOnComplete.description: Trigger a particle-burst celebration animation when each blank is answered correctly.

quizData.description: The full quiz content object. Override this to customise questions for a different chapter or topic.

title.description: Main heading shown at the top of the quiz.

subtitle.description: Short instruction text shown below the heading.

sentences.description: Array of sentence objects, each containing a template and one or more blanks.

id.description: Unique numeric ID for the sentence.

template.description: Array of text segments split at blank positions. Length must be blanks.length + 1.

blanks.description: One entry per blank in the sentence.

id.description: Unique string ID for this blank (e.g. 's1b1').

options.description: Exactly 3 answer choices to show in the dropdown.

correctAnswer.description: The string that must match exactly one item in options.

hint.description: Hint text shown after a wrong attempt. Should reference the specific activity in the chapter.

agent_readme.overview: MagnetQuiz is a standalone, fully animated fill-in-the-blank quiz React component for interactive science education. Students select answers from dropdowns; correct picks animate green with a particle burst; wrong picks shake and show a chapter-referenced hint. A progress bar and score screen round out the experience.

quick_reference.template_length_rule: template array length = blanks array length + 1

tool_call_examples.description: Default quiz — all 4 sentences from Chapter 4
Quiz with hints disabled (for assessment mode)
Custom 2-sentence quiz for a different topic

quizData.title: Light & Shadows
quizData.subtitle: Fill in the blanks to test your knowledge.

template: Objects that allow light to pass through completely are called

blanks.hint: Clear glass and clean water let you see right through them.

template: A shadow forms on the side

blanks.hint: Light travels in straight lines and cannot bend around an object.

decision_tree.student_wants_quiz: Use default parameters — all 4 sentences load automatically.
decision_tree.assessment_mode: Set showHints: false and celebrateOnComplete: false.
decision_tree.different_chapter: Override quizData with new title, subtitle, and sentences array.
decision_tree.more_sentences: Extend the sentences array; template length must equal blanks.length + 1.
decision_tree.style_change: Change themeColor to any hex value; the gradient headers and progress bar adapt automatically.
